sub_mechanisms: M_1: build attention DAG from layer-cross-layer attention scores
M_2: compute incidence-algebra Möbius function on the DAG poset
M_3: invert cascade to recover per-token causal contributions
M_4: attribution score from inversion residual
stripped_llm_application: Construct an attention DAG across layers; compute the incidence-algebra Möbius function on the DAG's reachability poset; invert the forward cascade to recover per-token causal contributions; emit attribution scores from the inversion residual.
novelty_claim_stripped: MöbiusAttention (arXiv:2409.12175) uses Möbius transformations (complex projective non-linear), NOT Möbius inversion on a poset. Inclusion-exclusion attribution via Möbius function on attention DAG is new.
